title: enterolobium barnebianum
intro: Enterolobium barnebianum, also known as the Monkey Pod or Ironwood tree, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating gastrointestinal issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and promoting digestive health, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, Enterolobium barnebianum is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
